name: Reece Limited
analysis: REH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$14.3000. Trade idea: entry A$15.8200, stop A$13.1868, target A$23.7196 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
